package_description: Thermal-envelope retrofit bundle covering insulation, draught sealing, and glazing upgrades for existing homes.
rollout_limit_notes: Retrofit uptake is limited by building access, contractor capacity, and household finance; treat the cap as an indicative stock-share ceiling rather than a normative target.
evidence_summary: Australian retrofit-program and building-electrification evidence support a modest carrier-preserving shell-efficiency wedge in existing homes.
derivation_method: Thin-slice calibration: apply one role-wide multiplier that stays materially smaller than the incumbent-to-electrified method jump while keeping the package easy to attribute in solver output.
review_notes: Applies only to incumbent and electrified-efficiency methods; deep-electric remains excluded to avoid double counting already-embodied shell and appliance gains.
